package rulecoverage

func PositiveResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFields() string {
    ruleID := "response_dto_uses_omitempty_on_required_contract_fields"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Response shapes that silently drop fields that should be stable parts of the API contract."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
